verdict: INCONCLUSIVE_DATA_PENDING — no outcome or no treatment variable in spec
verdict_reason: no outcome or no treatment variable in spec
falsification_rule_text: Not supported if, after controls for parental SES + language + parental education, the immigrant-background PISA-score gap remains larger than 0.3 standard deviations in a majority of sample countries AND the 2nd-generation gap is NOT materially smaller than the 1st-generation gap. Additionally, if origin-region residuals exceed the parental-SES coefficient magnitude, unmeasured origin factors (not channel- captured) dominate the explanation, weakening the channel- decomposition story.

estimate.error: no outcome or no treatment variable in spec

variables_missing.name: pisa_score_math
variables_missing.source: constructed: OECD PISA microdata, by student immigrant background + origin region

variables_missing.name: school_quality_equality_destination
variables_missing.source: constructed: destination-country PISA between-school variance / within-school variance ratio
